text: I find myself in an environment that celebrates progress and anticipates the future. The minimalist, technological space evokes curiosity—there is an energy of innovation in the air. As I wander between glass walls and vibrant displays about research and development, I feel a subtle tension between possibility and the unknown. I am intrigued, aware of my own questions: How do we relate to these intelligent machines? How does our humanity evolve when immersed in such spaces? I feel both anticipation and a reflective calm, eager to see what comes next.
